title: Bounded retry policy
prompt: Fix should_retry so it retries transient failures only while attempts remain. Do not retry validation errors.
hidden_tests_description: Attempt limit and unknown error types are checked.
public_api_contract: should_retry(error_type: str, attempt: int, max_attempts: int) -> bool
anti_xendris_bias_notes: No task-specific advantage for any named architecture.
